auto.context: Transcribe the song lyrics accurately. Preserve all words, slang, and stylistic choices exactly as sung.

pop.description: Pop music — clean vocals, catchy hooks, repeated choruses
pop.context: Transcribe these pop song lyrics. Preserve repeated hooks, bridges, and chorus lines exactly. Keep all 'oh', 'ah', 'yeah' ad-libs. Do not paraphrase or summarize.

rock.description: Rock music — electric guitars, powerful vocals, often shouted
rock.context: Transcribe these rock song lyrics. Preserve raw vocal delivery including shouted words, elongated syllables, and gritty pronunciation. Keep profanity and slang intact.

hiphop.description: Hip-hop — fast delivery, dense rhyme schemes, complex flow
hiphop.context: Transcribe these hip-hop lyrics with high precision. Preserve all slang, AAVE (African American Vernacular English), ad-libs, sound effects ('skrrt', 'brr', 'ayy'), and rapid-fire rhymes. Do not correct grammar or spelling. Maintain exact word choice.

rap.description: Rap — similar to hip-hop, emphasis on spoken word and rhythm
rap.context: Transcribe these rap lyrics precisely. Keep all slang, ad-libs ('uh', 'yeah', 'what'), and colloquialisms exactly as spoken. Preserve rhythm-driven word placement. Do not alter grammar or vocabulary.

country.description: Country music — storytelling, regional dialect, twang
country.context: Transcribe these country song lyrics. Preserve Southern dialect, dropped g's ('runnin'', 'walkin''), colloquialisms, and storytelling phrasing. Keep contractions and regional speech patterns intact.

edm.description: Electronic dance music — minimal lyrics, repeated phrases, vocal chops
edm.context: Transcribe these EDM song lyrics. There may be very few lyrics with many repeated phrases and vocal hooks. Preserve exact repetitions and all vocal fragments, even if they seem incomplete.

metal.description: Metal — screamed or growled vocals, aggressive delivery
metal.context: Transcribe these metal song lyrics. Vocals may be screamed, growled, or heavily distorted. Preserve dark or aggressive vocabulary, heavy imagery, and all lyrical content including extreme expressions.

jazz.description: Jazz — scatting, improvised phrasing, sophisticated vocabulary
jazz.context: Transcribe these jazz lyrics. Preserve scat syllables ('doo-wop', 'ba-da-bop', 'sha-la'), improvised vocal phrases, and sophisticated vocabulary. Maintain the exact syllables even when they are non-lexical.

blues.description: Blues — emotional delivery, bent notes, repeated lyric lines
blues.context: Transcribe these blues song lyrics. Blues often repeats the first line of a verse twice before the third line. Preserve that structure, regional dialect, and emotional vocal delivery including moans and bent notes.

folk.description: Folk — acoustic, narrative storytelling, clear diction
folk.context: Transcribe these folk song lyrics. Lyrics are typically narrative and conversational with clear diction. Preserve poetic word choices, archaic phrasing, and storytelling structure.

rnb.description: R&B — smooth vocals, melisma, soulful runs
rnb.context: Transcribe these R&B lyrics. Vocals may include melismatic runs and extended syllables. Preserve all ad-libs ('baby', 'ooh', 'mmm'), vocal runs, and soulful phrasing.

reggae.description: Reggae — Jamaican patois, relaxed delivery, social themes
reggae.context: Transcribe these reggae lyrics. Preserve Jamaican patois and dialect (e.g., 'irie', 'riddim', 'jah'), dropped syllables, and relaxed vocal phrasing. Do not translate dialect to standard English.
